Headline: Merger - South Cumbria Multi Academy Trust (State), Cumbria
Info: Co-op Academies Trust is set to absorb the six primary schools run by the struggling South Cumbria Multi Academy Trust, which is being dissolved following a financial notice to improve and a significant deficit.

Headline: Closure - St Lawrence College, Kent
Info: St Lawrence College, an independent day and boarding school, has shut its doors with immediate effect for the vast majority of its 500 pupils after falling into administration. Those in charge cited dwindling pupil numbers, the introduction of VAT on school fees, and mounting operational costs as contributing factors.

Headline: Closure - Fairview International School, Stirling
Info: Fairview International School has launched a consultation regarding its potential closure at the end of the academic year, citing significant financial challenges and declining enrolment numbers.

Headline: Closure - St Lawrence College, Kent
Info: St Lawrence College has closed with immediate effect for the vast majority of its pupils after falling into administration, with leadership citing dwindling pupil numbers, mounting operational costs, and the introduction of VAT on school fees.

Headline: News - One School Global, Torfaen
Info: A former call centre in Cwmbran is set to be converted into a new private faith school following approval from the local council committee.
